title: Festive Corn Tortilla Tacos
description: Salty and crumbly, these Festive Corn Tortilla Tacos are a festive Spanish dish featuring corn tortillas that have been toasted with spices for added flavor. Perfect for pescatarian diets.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of fresh corn tortilla chips
ingredients.notes: Toasted ahead and kept in an airtight container

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add salt to taste and cook until the tortilla chips become crispy and golden brown.
Stir in diced red bell pepper and finely chopped yellow onion.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let it simmer for about 5 minutes or until the vegetables are soft but not mushy.
